title: Using 'with' keyword with table returning function crashes monetdb
poc: CREATE TABLE test_table(x STRING, y STRING, z STRING);
CREATE TABLE results_table AS (\r\n     SELECT * FROM test_function( (select x, y, z FROM test_table ) ) \r\n );
key_bug_features: Using 'with' keyword in table returning function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(x STRING, y STRING, z STRING, a INT, b FLOAT, c DATE);
CREATE TABLE results_table AS (WITH test_table_tmp AS (SELECT x, y, z FROM test_table) SELECT * FROM test_function(test_table_tmp.x, test_table_tmp.y, test_table_tmp.z));
CREATE TABLE boundary_test AS (SELECT * FROM test_function(NULL, 'test', '2023-01-01'));
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE a > (SELECT MAX(a) FROM test_table);
